tasks.label: Build QuotaBar Errors
tasks.command: xcodebuild -scheme QuotaBar -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | grep 'error:' | head -10

tasks.label: Build QuotaBar
tasks.command: xcodebuild -scheme QuotaBar -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | grep -E 'BUILD|error:' | tail -5

tasks.label: Build QuotaBar
